title: No more mental math for your balance
summary:
A solid day of quality-of-life upgrades: dynamic balance estimates, bigger typography, and throttle-proof Gemini routing.

The pricing table now looks at your actual signed-in balance and tells you exactly how many generations you can afford across different models. We do the math so you don't have to.

We restored the website's title and heading sizes to be properly readable again, and standardized the subtitle format on the Play page to keep things tidy.

We updated the routing for Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite to use Vertex's global endpoint instead of a single region. This pools our quota and prevents throttling when the network gets busy.
